turns.user_message: Look, I know I smoke a lot. It's just something I do. I don't really see the big deal. My friends and family all smoke, so it's just a normal part of my life.
step2_rag_chunks: Many people smoke out of habit during specific routines such as after meals, while drinking tea or coffee, or when talking with friends.
Avoid situations where others are smoking during the early stages of quitting. Being around smokers can increase the urge to smoke.
Quitting smoking reduces the risk of lung disease, heart disease, and many types of cancer.

step4_session_phase.phase_instruction: You are in the ASSESSMENT phase. Focus on gathering basic facts: how long they have been smoking, how much they smoke per day, and what substance. Do NOT ask about triggers or suggest strategies yet. Ask only one simple factual question.

step2_rag_chunks: Nicotine addiction is both physical and psychological. Addressing both aspects can improve success in quitting.

If you have tried to quit before, that experience is actually useful information â€” not a failure. What worked even a little? What made it harder? Most people who successfully quit have tried several times before it sticks. Each attempt teaches you something about your own pattern.
Quitting smoking reduces the risk of lung disease, heart disease, and many types of cancer.
